title: Lungleiah hnu chhuitu police leh sawrkar ukil te'n hnu chhui kawnga thil pawimawh hrang hrang an sawi ho
content:
4771/2025-2026

Lunglei, 2026 Vau thla ni 10:Vawiin khan Lunglei SP Conference Hall-ah Lunglei Police-a hnu chhuitu, case investigating officer (Case I/O)-te leh Lunglei District Court-a sawrkar ukil (public prosecutor)-te chuan inkawm hona leh thil zir hona (meeting cum workshop) hun an hmang a. Dan bawhchhiatna a lo thlena hnu chhuina (case investigation) kalpui dan tur te, hnu chhuina kawnga fimkhur leh ṭan lak ngaihna laite an sawi ho.

He hunah hian Police Case I/O, Public Prosecutor leh Assistant Public Prosecutor mi 24 an tel a. Lunglei District Superintendent of Police Pu J. Lalmuankima chuan ṭhut khawm hi kaihruaiin, hnu chhuina kawnga hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang a sawi a. Kal khawmte'n hnu chhui chungchanga hmasawnna tur te, pawi khawihtute dan anga hrem an nih ngei theih nana hma lak dan tur leh hnu chhuitute tana dan hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrangte sawi hovin, an zir ho a ni.

title: PMUY Gas Connection pek chhuah chungchanga FCS&CA Department thuchhuah
content:
4770/2025-2026

Aizawl the 10th March, 2026 :PMUY connection pek chhuah theih hun chhung hi 31stMarch, 2026 thleng chauh hawn a nih avangin leh Mizorama Gas Distributor thenkhat ten connection diltu thenkhat te harsatna an siam sak tih hriatchhuah a ni a. Hei vang, hian a hnuaia inkaihhruaina te hi PMUY connection thar pek chhuah kawngah Mizoram Gas Distributor ten an zawm ngei tur a ni:

title: PARLIAMENT BUDGET SESSION NEIH MEKAH PU K.VANLALVENA'N AIZAWL TRAFFIC JAM TIH REH NAN FLYOVER BRIDGE SIAM TURIN SORKAR LAIPUI A NGEN
content:
4769/2025-2026

Dt 10.3.2026:Sorkar laipuiah Parliament Budget Session neih mekah Rajya Sabha MP Pu K.Vanlalvena chuan thu sawiin Aizawl khawpui Traffic Jam tih reh nan Flyover bridge siamsak turin sawrkar laipui a ngen.

Rajya Sabha MP chuan Aizawl khawpui chu tlangrama awm a nih avangin kan kawngpui neih sate chu a zau tha tawk lo tih sawiin hei hian traffic jam a siam nasat thu leh sawrkar office kal te, zirlai leh zirtirtu ten a hun takah office leh school an thlen hman loh thin thu te a sawi chhuak a. Hei hian mipui nunphung a tikhaihlak a ni mai lo va, hmasawnna a tibahlah a ni tih thu Pu K. Vanlalvena chuan a sawi bawk.

Sorkar laipui hnuaia Housing and Urban Ministry chuan India ram khawpui tamtakah Flyover bridges an siam tawh a. State hausa zawk khawpuiah te Union Urban Ministry in flyover bridge an siamsak theih chuan State rethei zawk Mizoram khawpui Aizawlah pawh flyover bridge a siamsak ngei chu a beisei thu a sawi.

Attachment

title: DM&R Minister-in Amrita University hotute kawm
content:
4768/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl: the 10 March 2026 :Vawiin khan Disaster Management & Rehabilitation Department changtu Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Chief Secretary Conference Hall, MINECO-ah, Mizorama khuarel chhiatna thleng (a bikin Leimin leh Lirnghingte) chungchang zir chianna nei tura cham mek Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetam University (Amrita University) hotute chu inkawmna hun a hmanpui a. Pu Udid Prakash Rai, Commissioner&Secretary DM&R Department chuan meeting hi kaihruaiin, Mizoram an cham chhunga Amrita University hotu ten zir chianna an kalpui dan tur ruahmannate thlirho a ni.

He hunah hian DM&R Department changtu Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Amrita University hotute chu thawhhona tha tak nen a hmalakpuiah sawmin, an cham chhunga zir chianna atang chuan Mizoram sawrkar leh mipuite pawhin hlawkna nasa tak an chhar chhuah ngei a beisei tlat tih a sawi a. Mizoram chu khuarel chhiatna chi hrang hrang: Leimin, Lirnghing leh a dangte thlen duh bikna leilunga awm a nih avangin, chumi lam kaihhnawih inzirtirna leh data rintlak tak neih chu tih makmawh a nih thu a tarlang a. Chumi atan chuan Amrita University-a mithiamte chu thawhpui tha tak an nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetam University hotute hi Mizorama khuarel chhiatna (a bikin Lirnghing leh leiminte) zir chianna nei a, invendan leh chhiatna leh a nghawng tihziaam nana hmalak dan turte zir chiang turin March ni 9 atanga ni 16 inkar Mizoramah an cham ang a. An cham chhung hian Aizawl khaw chhunga lung tlak/lei tawlh duhna hmun (rockfall zones)te bakah, District dang: Saitual, Khawzawl, Lawngtlai leh Mamit-a chhiatna thlen thinna hmunte an tlawhin zirchianna (survey) an nei dawn a ni.

Vawiina inkawmhonaah hian Amrita University aiawhin Dr. Maneesha Vinodini Ramesh Pro-Vice- Chancellor, Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetam & Principal Investigator, Landslight Early Warning system te,  Dr. S.k. Wadhawan, Adjunct Professor, Amrita University & GSI Director General lo ni tawh te, Dr.  Sabari Ramesh, Assistant Professor, Amrita University leh an team member-te an tel a. Aizawl DC, Er.  Lalhriatpuia leh Disaster Management & Rehabilitation Department hotute bakah Mizoram Sawrkara  hotu pawimawh tak tak ten Amrita University team te hi an lo dawngsawng a ni.

Attachment

title: P&E MINISTER PU F RODINGLIANA LEH ADANI GROUP AIAWHTE’N MEGAWATT 460 THAR CHHUAK THEI TUR CHHIMTUIPUI (KOLODYNE) HYDEL PROJECT KHUAH DAN TUR AN SAWIHO
content:
4767/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 10th March, 2026:Nimin, March ni 9, 2026 (Thawhtanni) tlai lam khan Pu F Rodingliana, Minister, Power & Electricity Department chuan a pisa-ah P&E Department hotute nen Adani Group aiawhte kawmin, 460 MW thar chhuak thei tur Chhimtuipui (Kolodyne) Hydel Project khuah dan tur leh Mizorama power sector tihhmasawnna kawnga Mizoram Sorkar leh Adani Group thawhho theih dan tur an sawiho.

P&E Minister Pu F Rodingliana hian Adani Group aiawha lo kalte chu lawmthu hrilhin, Mizoram Sorkar-in power intodelh a tumna kawngah thawhpui tur company tha a dap mek laia India rama company lian leh rintlak ber zinga mi Adani Group-te’n Mizoram lam hawia hmalak duhna an nei chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Minister hian hydro power sector-ah Mizoram hian potential sang tak a neih thu sawiin, chu’ng hai chhuak tur chuan puihna a mamawh a, Adani Group-te an rawn lang ta chu phurawm a tih thu a lo hrilh a ni.

Pu Sumit Verma, Vice President of Business Development - Hydro Pump Storage Project, Adani Group pawhin Mizoram Sorkar lo dawnsawnnaah lawmthu sawiin, tun hnaiah Adani Group chuan green energy development lamah nasa taka hma a lak thu leh he lama Mizoramin haichhuah tur a neihte haichhuahpui a, thawhhona tha tak an neih chhoh zel a beisei thu a sawi a. Project site-te a hmun ngeia tlawh tura lo kal an nih angin a hmun an kalchilh nghal dawn tih a sawi bawk a ni.

He inkawmnaah hian project site pahnih: Chhimtuipui (Kolodyne-II) Hydel Project ruahman mek leh Darzolui Pump Storage Project site-te chu Adani Group-te tlawh tura rel niin, March ni 10, 2026 atangin he’ng hmunhma tlawh hian an zinchhuak nghal dawn a ni.

P&E Minister hi P&E Commissioner Pi K Lalrinzuali leh Department Engineer-te’n an tawiawm a. Adani Group atanga rawn kalte chu Pu Sumit Verma, Vice President, Business Development - Hydro Pump Storage Project (PSP) bakah Arindam Banerjee, Senior Manager, Hydro PSP; Deepak Singh, Sr Engineer, PMAG and Hydro PSP; Sudhakar Rao, Dy Manager, Projects leh Narayanswamy, Manager, Projects & Hydro PSP te an ni.

title: Myanmar ram atanga sawhthing lak luh chungchanga Aizawl District Magistrate Thuchhuah
content:
4766/2025-2026

Aizawl the 10th March, 2026 :Sawrkar hriatpuina lohvin tunlai hian Myanmar ram atangin sawhthing lak luh a ni thin tih hriat a ni a. Hetianga dan phal lohva ram dang atanga sawhthing lak luh a nih chuan Mizoram economy in a tawrh dawn bakah an tharchhuahte hralhna kawngah sawhthing chingtuten nasa takin harsatna an tawk dawn a. Chubakah sawrkar flagship programme “Bana Kaih” hlawhtlinna tur dal thei tu a ni thei bawk a ni.

Chuvangin, Aizawl District mipuite zawm turin, kei.Er. Lalhriatpuia, IAS, District MagistratehianSection 163, BNSS 2023in thuneihna min pek angin a hnuaia khapna thupek hi ka chhuah e.

“Aizawl District huamchhungah mi tumahin phalna nei lovin sawhthing an la lutin an phur tur a ni lo”

He khapna thupek zawm lo te chuSection 223, BNS 2023hmangin an chungah hremna lek a ni ang. He thupek hi chhuah a nih atanginthla hnih (2 months)chhung a huam ang.

He thupek hi vawiin9thMarch, 2026hian District Magistrate Seal-a nemnghetin hming ka ziah hnan e.

title: Serchhipah Free Public Hearing - Mahila Jan Sunwai neih a ni
content:
4765/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 10th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Serchhip Kawnpui VC Hall ah hmeichhia hleilenna tuartu te tan Free Public Hearing - Mahila Jan Sunwai neih a ni a. DC Pu Paul L Khuma leh Mizoram State Women Commission Chairperson Pi C Zodinpuii ten hun an hmanpui a ni.

Sawrkar hna thawk kan ni a, mipui rawngbawlsaktu kan nih angin vawiina kan thiltih hi mipui rawngbawlsakna ‘government service’ a ni, DC chuan a ti a. Aizawl pan ngai lovin, a thawktute ngei rawn kal a, kan harsatnate min chinfel sak hi a lawmawm tak zet a ni, a ti. Pu Paul L Khuma chuan domestic violence - nupuite kutthlak ching kan awm chu pawi a tih thu sawiin nu leh pa ten kan fate entawntlaka kan awm a tulzia i hre thar leh ang u, a ti a. Kan nute emaw, kan farnute emaw, hleilenna tuar kan awm chuan a thlenna tur dik takah kan thlen a, Dan-in dikna chanvo min pekte hi a taka kan chan theih a tul thu sawiin Mahila Jan Sunwai tangkai taka hmang turin duhsakna a hlan a ni.

Mizoram State Women Commission Chairperson Pi C Zodinpuii pawhin thu sawiin hmeichhia hleilenna tuar ten Aizawl an pan kher ngai loin District tinah DC kaihhruaina hnuaiah Commission member te, Legal Services Authority, CDPO, DPO, DCPO, police department te nen tanghoin International Women’s Day denchhenin 9- 13 March, 2026 chhung hian Mahila Jan Sunwai an neih thu a sawi a. Serchhip District ah chuan March ni 10, 2026 hian nilengin hun an hmang dawn a, an harsatna chinfel nghal theih chi chu chinfel nghal a ni ang, a ti. Case lut a tam lo a nih pawhin mi tlemte tal pawhin hlawkna an chan theih hi kan duh a ni, a ti bawk.

Vawiin nileng khan Mahila Jan Sunwai hun hi hman a ni a. Hmeichhe pangate complaint dawn a ni a, an case hi hmun leh hmunah chin fel nghal theih a nih loh avangin police, DLSA leh OSC lamah refer an ni. Complaint tam zawk te hi hmeichhiate dikna chanvo rahbeh sakna te, chhawmdawlna dawn tur ang dawnglo te, ro khawm chungchanga buaina te leh child custody chungchang te an ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah hmeichhia chawikanna Mahila Jan Sunwai hmang
content:
4764/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 10th March 2026:Vawiin khan Champhai Circuit House Conference Hall-ah International Women's Day (Hmeichhiate Ni) pualin Mizoram State Commission For Women (MSCW) leh Champhai hotute bultumin hmeichhiate chawikanna leh lawmna hun, Mahila Jan Sunwai hman a ni a, Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan hmanpuiin thu a sawi. He hunah hian Champhai hmeichhiate'n harsatna an tawh te sawina hun (public hearing) a awm bawk a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan Women's Day pualin hun hman ni mahse hmeichhiate chu nitin kumtluana lawm tur an ni tih a sawi a, public hearing an neih tur te pawh tha taka hman a nih theih nan leh nakin zelah pawh hman tangkai a nih theih nan a fuih a. He hun hlu tak buatsaihtute chungah lawmthu sawiin Mahila Jan Sunwai a hawng nghal a ni.

He hun hi MSCW Member Pi Lalchhuanmawii'n kaihruaiin he hun thiltum leh MSCW hnathawh hrang hrang te a sawi. International Women's Day puala intihsiakna Essay Writing Competition lawmman sem a ni a, lawmman latute chu

1st - Andy-a Pa2nd - Zorinpuia3rd - Zothansangi

te an ni. Khawtlang tana inpekna avanga chawimawina Selfless Service Award Pi Lalchhandami, New Champhai hnenah hlan a ni bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Champhai pisa hotute leh hmeichhia thahnem tak an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LPG endik chungchanga FCS&CA Department thuchhuah
content:
4763/2025-2026

Aizawl the 10th March, 2026:LPG Manual, 2021, Section 5.3 in a phut angin Oil Marketing Company (OMC) leh Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) te inkaihhruaina angin LPG con­sumer te him tlan zawk nan a khat tawkin endikna neih thin a ni a.

Hetiang endikna neih hian a tum ber chu mipuite himna a ni a, kan LPG dahna hmun leh hman dan te a him tawk em tih te endik a ni thin. Tin, LPG kaihhnawih avanga vanduaina a lo thlen palh changin hetianga endikna paltlang te chauh hian zangnadawmna an dawng thei a ni.

OMC te dan siam angin endikna atana service charge chu Rs.200/- bakah 18% GST niin, a belhkhawmin Rs.236/- a ni. Hei hi OMC leh IOCL te chan tur a ni a, State sawrkarin chan tur a nei lo.

He endikna hi April, 2026 chhungin chhunzawm leh tum a ni a, LPG hmangtu zawng zawngte kan him tlan nan a endiktute hi tha taka lo thawhpui tura ngen kan ni.

title: WOMEN AND CHILD DEVELOPMENT, KOLASIB BUATSAIHIN KOLASIBAH MAHILA JAN SUNWAI (FREE LEGAL PUBLIC HEARING) LEH INTERNATIONAL WOMEN’S DAY, 2026 HMAN A NI
content:
4762/2025-2026

Kolasib, the 10th March, 2026:Vawiin khan I&PR Conference Hall, Project Veng, Kolasib-ah International Women’s Day 2026 pualin Women and Child Development, Kolasib bultumin Mahila Jan SunWai (Free Legal Public Hearing) buatsaih a ni. He hun hi Kolasib Additional Deputy Commissioner (Addl. DC) Pi B. Malsawmtluangi chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Khuallian Pi B. Malsawmtluangi chuan tunlai khawvelah hmeichhiate chuan kawng hrang hrangah hma an sawn nasa hle tih sawiin, hmeichhe dinhmun inthlak danglam chho zel chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. Politics-ah pawh VCP atanga MLA thlengin hmeichhia hmuh tur an awm ta chu hmasawnna ropui tak a nih thu tarlangin, Mizoram Legislative Assembly-ah hmeichhia pathum ngawt mai kan nei chu chhuanawm a tih thu a sawi.

Politics chauh ni lovin, infiamna (sports) lamah pawh boxing, football leh volleyball-ah te hmeichhiate an langsar hle a. Eizawnna kawng hrang hrangah pawh mipa tih chi anga ngaih thin two-wheeler taxi, auto rickshaw leh sumo khalh thlengin hmeichhiain an ti ve thei ta a, sumdawnna kawngah pawh sa sat thlengin hmeichhia an awm ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi bawk.

Tun hma chuan hmeichhiate chu mipa lakah an innghat tawp thin a, tunah chuan mahni inchawm zo leh ding chhuak thei an ni ta chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi. Hmasawnna nasa tak karah hian hmeichhe fing nih a pawimawhzia sawiin, Addl. DC chuan, "Eng anga dinhmun sangah pawh ding ila, mipate zah leh chawimawi thiam hi kan zir a ngai a. Hmeichhe fing leh Pathian tih mi nih hi a pawimawh em em a ni," a ti.

Hmasawnna tur tam tak hmeichhiate'n an la neih thu tarlangin, khuallian chuan mahni hmeichhe puite initsik lova inchawimawi tawn leh inkaitho tawn turin kalkhawmte a chah a. Hmeichhe pawl hrang hrang, a bikin MHIP te chu chak takin an thang chho zel a, heng pawlte hi hmeichhiate inchawikang tawnna leh inthuamchak tawnna atana hmanraw pawimawh tak an nih thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian Pi Rinpari Ralte, Member, Mizoram State Commission for Women, Aizawl pawhin thu sawiin, Women Commission hmalakna point 13 a tarlang a. MSCW chuan kum kalta chhung khan case 143 dawngin, theih anga complaint te chu chinfel a nih thu a sawi. Hmeichhiaten harsatna (Complaint) an neih te chu Aizawl kal kher ngai lovin District Programme Officer, Kolasib hnenah engtik lai pawhin a thehluh theih tih a sawi a. Hmeichhiate chu 'primary care giver' an nih thu leh, hmeichhiate zalenna hmunah chuan vantlang khawsaknaah ralmuanna a awm thin thu a sawi bawk. Tun dinhmunah Mizoram Women Commission-ah member 6 an awm mek a ni.

Inkhawm hi Pi Lalnunpari Hmar, District Programme Officer, WCD chuan a kaihruai a. He hunah hian Kolasib District huamchhunga hmeichhe dinhmun chawi kanga, vantlang tana thawhhlawk leh midangte tanpui thin (Women Achiever) te hnenah chawimawina hlan an ni a. Pi Elizabeth Lalmuankimi, DMC, DHEW chuan lawmman semna hun hi a hmang a ni.

Chawimawina dawngtute chu:

Hmeichhia chunga hleihlenna tawkte tan counselling leh Free Legal Public hearing neih nghal a ni a. He hunah hian Addl. SP Kolasib, Judicial Officials, Women & Child Development hnuaia Office hrang hrang - ICPS, One Stop Centre, Shakti Sadan Staff te, MHIP Sub-Hqrs hruaitute, Anganwadi worker te leh Indian Christian Women Movement atangin mi thahnem tak an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: SIAHA DISTRICT-A VC PARUK BY-ELECTION NEIH TURA DRAFT ELECTORAL ROLL TLANGZARH A NI
content:
4761/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 10, March 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 10:30AM khan DC Mini conference hall, Siahaah Village council paruk inthlan ṭhatna (by election) neiha hman tur draft electoral roll chu District Election Officer leh Bawrhsap nibawk Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte chuan a tlangzarh.

Thu sawiin Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte chuan vote nei thei tura roll-a inthunluh chu ram leh hnam humhalhna rilru pu chunga neih tur nia a hriatthu sawiin, “Mikhual chamrei, nungchang ṭha; kohhran leh khawtlanga inhmang tak annih avangin India khua leh tui dik tak an ni tihna a ni lo, an harsatna ṭanpui hi a ṭhaa; roll-a thun erawh kan bat a ni lo,” a ti.

Election officer Pu Vanlalchhuanliana chuan Inthlan ṭhatna (by election) neihna tur khuate chu general seat vek a nih thu sawiin, chungte chu - Meisavaih East (seat 2), Thosai (seat 1), College Vaih II (seat 1), Noaotlah III (seat 1), Tipa V-III (seat 1) leh Khaikhy (seat 1) a ni a, hemi huam chhunga vote nei awmzat chu 2496 niin, chhungkua 659 an nih thu a sawi. EO chuan April 2026 aṭangin Siaha district-ah Special Intensive Revision (SIR) neih tum anih thu leh hemi hunah hian thil inthlak tam tak awm thei anih avangin party tin leh NGOs aiawhte chu thawhpuiah a sawm nghal.

Vawiin hun hmannah hian party hrang hrang aiawh, AERO leh Election branch staff-te an tel a, DEO hian party tinte chu draft electoral roll copy khat ṭheuh a sem nghal. Claims & objection hi March ni 20, 2026 thleng thehluh theih niin; final electoral roll hi March ni 27, 2026-ah tlangzarh tum a ni. Draft electoral roll tlangzarh anih hnu hian Election officer Pu Vanlalchhuanliana hovin AERO te tan training neih chhunzawm nghal a ni.

title: Mamit-ah International Women’s Day 2026 leh Manila Jan Sunwai( Free Legal Public Hearing) hman a ni
content:
4760/2025-2026

Dated: Mamit the 10th of March, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall,Mamit-ah Mahila Jan Sunwai - hmeichhia harsatna tawkte a thlawna thubuai remsakna leh Hmeichhiate Ni(International Women’s Day) hun hman niin Dr Hmingthanzuali, Member, Mizoram State Commission for Women leh Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte,Addl DC, Mamit te chuan hun an hmanpui.

Dr Hmingthanzuali chuan National Commission for Women ina a ngaihpawimawh Mahila Jan Sunwai leh IWD 2026 lawman Hun Mamit hman a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin hmeichhiate chawimawi leh dawmkanna kawngah hma kan sawn zel chu changkanna tehfung pawimawh a ni a ti a, hmeichhiate hian kan dikna leh chanvo hriaa in chawikan leh chawimawi hi kan chhunzawm zel a tha a ni. Dr Hmingthanzuali chuan Mizoram State Commission for Women chuan hmeichhia te harsatna sutkian chu a tum ber niin nasa takin hemi kawngah hian hma à la a,2025 atanga vawiin ni theng Commission hnuaiah hian 143 case a lut tawh a, nu leh fa enkawl tumna tur chungchangte, hleihlenna tawrh te, intih hmingchhiat leh hmeichhe harsatna hmachhawn hrang hrang te a ni a,office a kal harsa te tan Ph no- 6909588820 ah biak theih reng an nih thu a sawi.

Vawiin hunah hian Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte chuan hmeichhiate leh naupangte tana thawk zawng zawng te chu chhuanawm tiin midang tana entawntlaka nung zel turin a chah a, IWD 2026 theme “Give to Gain” chu kan nuna vawn a pawimawh a, Mizo inzirtirna nen pawh inmilhin midang kan tanpui hian tanpuina kan dawng let zel a ni a ti.

Vawiin hun hi Pu Lalruatmawia, DPO,WCD chuan a kaihruai a, chawhma lamah International Women’s Day 2026 lawmna hun hman a ni a, Women achiever’s pahnih hnenah chawimawina hlan a ni

1. Zohmingliani - Thirdeng a eizawng2. H.Lalhlimpuii- Chhang siam a eizawng

Chawnhnu session-ah hian Mahila Jan Sunwai- hmeichhia harsatna tawkte a thlawna thubuai remsakna( Free Legal public hearing) hun hman a ni a, Pi Carolyn LB Khiangte,Addl DC, Dr Hmingthanzuali,Member Mizoram State Commission for Women, Pi C.Lalbiaksiami, Addl SP, Pu Lalruatmawia Ralte,DPO,WCD bakah DLSA member ten thubuai hi an ngaihthlak sak ang.

Attachment

title: Aizawl District DCC/DLRC/D DLSC (for quarter ended December,2025) Meeting neih a ni
content:
4759/2025-2026

Aizawl;the 10thMarch,2026:Vawiin  khan  Aizawl DC  Pisapui Hall-ah District Consultative Committee(DCC)/ District Level Review Committee (DLRC)/ District Level Security Committee (DLSC) (for quarter ended  December, 2025) meeting neih a ni a. Meeting hi DCC/DLRC/DLSC Chairman aiawhin Pu Zoremsiama Hmar, Addl.DC  chuan kaihruaiin,meeting-ah hian Quarter ended  December,2025 thlenga Aizawl district chhunga Bank hrang hrang te hnathawh leh hmalakna te, Sawrkar Department nena sawrkar laipui schemes leh Projects hrang hrang te tih hlawhtling tura thawhho dan te leh Bank Security chungchang te thlir hova, huang zau taka sawi ho a ni.

Vawiin meeting Chairman Pu  Zoramsiama Hmar chuan  concern  department-a Head of Office te’n meeting an ngai pawimawh viau laia, Banker  lam zawkin meeting ngai pawimawh lova, Banker thahnem tak  meeting-a an absent  chu a lungchhiat thlak  thu sawiin,  meeting-a tel lo banker te hnenah Show cause notice peka, a tul dan anga thuneitu hnenah pawh thlen a tul ang, a ti.  Pu Zoramsiama chuan  DCC/DLRC/DLSR quarterly meeting hi Bank hrang hrang ten engtin nge mipui rawng an bawl tih enletna te, hmasawn an ngaihna leh tan an lak zual ngaina lai te, Bank Security leh a khaihhnawih thil te,sawrkar department nen tha zawka thawhho dan tur te sawihona leh inhrilhhriatna platform pawimawh tak a ni a. Chuvangin vawiin ang meeting pawimawh ngaihsak lo Banker te chungah hian a lungawi thlak lo viau a ni, a ti. Sawrkar laipuiin mipui te hamthatna tura project leh scheme hrang hrang a duan te tih hlawhtling tir tura Banker te leh concern sawrkar Department te hi thawkho tur kan ni a.Mipui lainatna leh hmangaihna nena kan hna hi tha taka thawk turin sawrkar chuan min beisei a ni, a ti bawk.

Vawiin meeting-ah hian heng agenda hrang hrang:

Quarter ended December,2025 a Aizawl District pumpuia overall CD ratio hi 45.46%  niin,Quarter ended September,2025 (CD Ratio-51.69%) a ni laiin,  quarter ended December,2025- ah chuan 6.21% a tla hniamin,CD Ratio hi 45.46 chauh a ni. Quarter ended December,2025 chhunga CD Ratio tam ber hi Indian Bank niin, 489.45% a ni a. A tlem ber hi YES Bank niin, 4.62% a ni thung.

Aizawl district chhungah hian Bank 24 awmin, chung zing atang chuan CD ratio 20% hnuailam Bank 4 an awm a.20% to 30% inkar nei Bank 1 awmin,30% to 40% inkar nei bank 2 a awm a. 40% aia tam CD Ratio neih Bank 17 an awm mek a ni.

title: HORTICULTURE MINISTER-IN CHAPCHAR KUT FLOWER SHOW 2026 A HAWNG
content:
4758/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 10th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Horticulture Department hmalakna hnuaia Chapchar Kut denchhena buatsaih Chapchar Kut Flower Show chu Aijal Club Park-ah hman ṭan a ni a. He Flower Show hi Horticulture Department Minister Pu C. Lalsawivunga’n hawngin, a hawnna inkhawm hi khuallian niin a hmanpui a. Horticulture Department Director Pu C.H. Lalmuanpuia’n hun a kaihruai a ni.

Khuallian Pu C. Lalsawivunga chuan he Flower Show buatsaihtu Horticulture Department-a thawktute, Association hrang hrangte leh an pangpar tharchhuah mawi tak tak rawn phochhuaktute chungah lawmthu a sawi a. Mizoram mipui mai nilo, India ram hmun hrang hrang leh khawvel ram dang atanga khualzinte pawhin flower show hi hmu ve se a duh thu sawi a. Mipuite chu khualzin thleng thiam leh dawngsawng thiam an nih a pawimawh thu sawiin, Mizoram hi khualzin hiptu ram mawi leh nuam taka kan siam a ngaih thu a sawi a. Mizorama hnam hrang hrang chenghote chu he flower show-a pangpar chi hrang hrang mawi tak takte anga Mizoram tana par chhuak ve turin a sawm a. Kumin Chapchar Kut thupui hi inremna a nih angin Mizoram chhunga cheng zawng zawngte hian hnambil leh chibil rilru pu lova, inpumkhatna tha kan neih a pawimawh, a ti a. Kan zavaia thinlungah Chapchar Kut hian inremna rawn thlen se a duhawm hle tih sawiin, mitinte hlim tak leh nuam taka Chapchar Kut hmang turin duhsakna a hlan nghal a ni.

Kumin 2026-ah hian Chief Minister kaihhruaina hnuaia Chapchar Kut Organizing Committee ruahmanna leh Horticulture hmalakna-in Chapchar Kut Flower Show 2026 hi March Ni 10-12 chhungin Aijal Club Park-ah hman a ni dawn a. He Flower Show-ah hian pangpar chi hrang hrang leh Bonsai-te mawi taka pholan a ni a. Pangpar zuar duhte tan Stall 72 buatsaih a ni a. UD&PA ngenna zawmin Chapchar Kut Flower Show chhung hian bawlhhlawh tello-a hun nuam tak hman a nih theih nan Hman khat daih (Single use plastic) hmang tlem tura inzirtirna uar taka kalpui a ni bawk.

He Flower Show hi Covid-19 hunlai (2021-2022) tihloh chu 2019 atang khan kumtin hman a ni a. Kum 2023 khan Chapchar Kut & G20 Summit Flower Show-cum-Fair hman a ni a, hemi hunah hian India ram chhung mai bakah ram hrang hrang 17 atangin G20 delegates ten an rawn chhim a, theihtawpa ropuia inbuatsaih niin chhimtute pawhin hlawhtlak an ti hle a ni. Chapchar Kut Flower Show hi Horticulture Department leh Association pali - Mizoram Florists’ Association (MFA), Zo-Anthurium Growers Co-operative Society (ZAGCS), Bonsai Association of Mizoram (BAM) leh Orchid Society of Mizoram (ORSOM) te ṭangkawpa buatsaih ṭhin a ni a. Pawl hrang hrangte chet velna senso hi Horticulture Department bultum a ni ṭhin. Heng Association-te hian an item chi hrang hrang mawi takin an pholang ṭhin a. Chu mai bakah pangpar chin lama eizawngte ṭan inzawrhna hmun stall siamsak an ni ṭhin.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN INTERNATIONAL WOMEN'S DAY HMANG
content:
4757/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 10th March 2026:Vawiin khan District Hub for Empowerment of Women (DHEW), District Programme Officer (WCD), Lawngtlai District leh Lairam Isua Krista Baptist Kohhran Hmeichhe Pawl tankawp a buatsaihin 'International Women's Day ' hman a ni a, Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan khuallian niin a hmanpui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan ' International Women's Day' hman a nih theih nan a hmalatute chungah leh kawlkhawmte hnenah lawmthu sawina a nei a. Dimna nei miah lo a hmeichhe chunga hleihlenna te chu idan angin hunhim a ni tawh a, State leh Sawrkarlaipui ten hmeichhia te dinhmun ngaipawimawhin, lei rem an rahna turin hma a la nasa hle a, hmalak zel pawh a ni dawn a ni, a ti. Hmeichhiate dinhmun chawikan zel a nih theih nan theihtawp chhuah zel a tul tih tarlangin, chhungkuaah leh khawtlangah hmeichhiate chanvo tha zawk pek thiam a hun tawh tak zet tih a sawi a. A bik takin Mizo hmeichhiate chu thenawm ramte nena khaikhinin dinhmun tha taka ding an ding tawh nia ahriat thu tarlangin, an dinhmun thatnate chu a tha zawnga hmang thiam theuh turin a chah a.Rilru nghet tak neih chu mi puitling nihna pawimawh tak a ni tiin, hmeichhiate tan rilru nghet leh tluang tak neih zel a pawimawh a ti. Bawrhsap chuan hmeichhiate dinhmun hrethiam a kawng hrang hranga hmasawnna an neih theih nan a thawk zel turin kalkhawmte leh Lawngtlai mipuite a sawm nghal bawk.

Pi Lalengvari -DHEW, DPO (WCD), Lawngtlai District chuan programme a kaihhraui a, International Women Day 2026 Theme 'Give to Gain' bawhzuinna pualin Chawimawina Thuziak leh ₹2000 chu H Lalenkawli MCS, leh Lalrinzuali MFAS, tling tharte hnenah hlan a ni a, LWA leh MHIP te hnenah lawmman hlan an ni bawk. Anganwadi- a mi tlawmngaite thilpek dahkhawm chu Lai Motherless Home, One Stop Centre, Shakti Sadhan, Oasis Boys Home leh Observation Home te pek an ni. Upa H Lalduhawmi, Chairman, Central LIKBKHP, LWA leh MHIP aiawh in thusawina tawi an nei a ni.

International Women's Day -hi United Nations (UN) hmalaknain  kum 1977 atang khan hman tan a ni a,  United Nations (UN) chuan kumin  thupuiah "Give to Gain" a  thlang  a ni.

Attachment

title: P&E control room, Electric veng, Hnahthial Atanga Thingsai road panna kawng khar dawn
content:
4756/2025-2026

Hnahthial, 10th March, 2026 :

NOTIFICATION

P&E control room, Electric veng, Hnahthial Atanga Thingsai road panna kawng chu alkatra hmanga  siam that a ni dawn a, kawng repair hna hi chak tak leh tha tak a thawh anih theih nan SDO, PWD, Hnahthial Sub Division-I chuan ziak in Road Block SP, Hnahthial hnenah a rawn dil a. Helai kawng pawimawh tak hi tlo leh tha tak a siam a nih theih nan Gov’t of Mizoram Notification No.12021/10/2004/TRF Dt 27.5.2020 in Mv Act Sec 115 R/W Gov’t of Mizoram, Home Department Memo No..A.19018/294/2008-HMP Dt 12thApril, 2022 hmang a lirthei tlandan tur khuahkhirhna siam thei tura thuneihna min pek anginDt 10.03.2026 (Thawhlehni) zing dar 10:00 am Atanga tlai dar 5 pm thlengin P&E control room, Electric veng, Hnahthial atanga Thingsai roadpan na kawngah hian lirthei eng chi pawh tlan phalloh(Road Block)a ni tih thupek ka chhuah e. He thupek hi zawm lo an awm a nih chuan MV Act Section-179 hmangin an chungah dan anga hmalak a ni ang.

Tin, he thupek hian Magistrate/Police/F&ES leh medical emergency duty lirthei che vel te a huam loving.

Attachment

title: Saitualah harsatna tawk hmeichhiate a thlawna thubuai remsak
content:
4755/2025-2026

Saitual, the 10th March, 2026:Vawiin khan International Women’s Day 2026 denchhenin DHEW Office, Multi-Purpose Shopping Complex, Saitualah hmeichhe harsatna tawkte a thlawnna thubuai remsakna hun- ‘Mahila Jan Sunwai’ (Free Legal Public Hearing’ neih a ni.

He hunah hi Pi Laltanpuii, Member, Mizoram State Commission for Women chuan inlawmna thu a sawi a, Mizoram State Commission for Women tobul te leh an hnathawh hrang hrang te bakah thubuai an chinfel dan te a tarlang a ni.

Vawiin Free Legal Public Hearing-ah hian hmeichhia te chuan heng thubuai- thuamchhawm chungchang, inchhungkhura hleilenna (domestic violence), hnathawhna hmuna innghaisakna (harassment at workplace), sawrkar scheme hrang hranga an dikna chanvo hmuh loh, office hrang hranga ngaihsakna an dawn loh, fa enkawltu tur chungchang, leiba inrul duh lo, nupa inthen chungchanga harsatna hrang hrang leh harsatna dang engpawh nei te chuan an buaina te an thlen a, an thubuai te chinfelsak kawngah hma laksak an ni.

Vawiinah hian hmeichhe harsatna tawk te thubuai remsak turin Pi Laltanpuii, Member, Mizoram State Commission for Women, Pu Srinivas Sadi, DC, Pu Hmingthansanga, SDPO, District Nodal Officer for Mahila Jan Sunwai, Pi Mary Malsawmkimi-Protection Officer, WCD Liaison Officer for Mahila Jan Sunwai, Pi R. K Lalrinsangi, Advocate, Pi J.H. Lalbiaknungi, Advocate te an te thu a ni.

Attachment

title: ZEMABAWK WEST LC INTHLAN TUR CHUNGCHANGA SEC THUCHHUAH
content:
4754/2025-2026

Aizawl the 10th March, 2026 :State Election Commission chuan VII/5 - Zemabawk West Local Council Constituency inthlanna March ni 25, 2026 a neih turah hriattur hrang hrang a hnuai ami ang hian a chhuah:

1. CAMPAIGN PERIOD TAWP HUN:March ni 23, 2026 tlai dar 5:00PM atanga March ni 25, 2026 tlai dar 5:00 PM chhungah campaign neih phal a ni tawh dawnlo.

2. DOCUMENT HMAN THEIH:Vote inthlaksak emaw vote thlak nawn a awm loh chuan voter te nihna tichiangtu turin Document engemaw ber hmangin Presiding Officer/Polling Officer hmaah an hmuh tur a ni:

(i) Elector's Photo Identity Card (EPIC), ECI in a tih chhuah(ii) Aadhaar Card(iii) Passport(iv) Driving License;(v) Income Tax Identity (PAN) Card,(vi) State/Central Government, Public Sector Undertakings, Local Bodies emaw Public Limited Company-te'n an hnuaia hnathawkte hnena an pekchhuah thin Service Identity Card,(vii) Heng Public Sector Banks /Post Office atanga lak chhuah Passbook leh Kisan Passbook(viii) Property Documents heng Patta, Registered Deeds, etc. thlalak chuanna,(ix) Thuneitu ruat bikte hnen atanga lakchhuah SC/ST/OBC Certificate leh Residential Certificate,(x) Pension Documents, heng Ex-servicemen's Pension Book/Pension Payment Order, Ex-servicemen's Widow/ Dependent Certificate, Old Age Pension Order, Widow Pension Order,(xi) Pianphunga rualban lo te hnena Certificate pek, thlalak chuang, thuneitu ruat bikte hnen atanga lak chhuah;(xii) Head of Institution-in a tihchhuah Student's Identity Card,Heng document-te hmang lo a vote thlak tir an awma vote inthlaksak leh thil dik lo hmuh chhuah a nih chuan Presiding Officer leh Polling Officer-te'n mawh an phur ang.

3. SORKAR HNATHAWKTE MODEL CODE OF CONDUCT BAWHCHHE LO TURA HRIATTIRNA:Sorkar hnathawk chu election campaign kaihhnawih emaw, contesting candidate do zawngin emaw an telin an che tur a ni lo a.  Election campaign kaihhnawih ah Minister ah tawiawm thianglo a, thusawi leh langsar taka tel phalsak an ni lo. Hnathawhnaah political party te nen indawr a ngaih pawhin khawi party mah tan bik a nei tur a ni lo. Code of Conduct bawhchhiatna a awm chuan Central Celivil Services (Classification, Control and Appeal) Rules, 1965 hnuaiah a chungthu ngaihtuah sak theih a ni ang.

title: Chapchar Kut 2026 Pualin Hnahthial District-ah Kut Bazar hawn a ni
content:
4753/2025-2026

Dated Hnahthial, the 10th March, 2026:Vawiin khan Hnahthial Bazar tual zawlah Chapchar Kut 2026 denchhenin Kut Bazar chu Hnahthial Bawrhsap, Pi K. Vanlalruati'n a hawng a. Hnahthial mipuite ban phak a Zo thuam lei theihna leh Food Processing lama eizawngte tan inpho chhuahna remchang tak ni a a hmuh thu sawiin kum dangah pawh tih chhunzawm zel tlak ni a a hmuh thu a sawi. He hawnna hun hi Hnahthial District Commerce & Industries Officer (DCIO), Pu HB Lalremmawia chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan kum danga kan la neih ngai loh, Chapchar Kut khuhhawnna, District Capital hmun laili, Bazar tual zawlah Kut bazar buatsaih a ni thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin a buatsaihtu, Commerce & Industries Department a thawkte leh a thawhpuite thawrimna zar a nih thu a sawi a. Kan Zo thuam hmuh theihna awlsam leh Food Processing lama eizawngte tan a mipui lei tura thil chhawpchhuahna hun remchang siam a ni chu ropui a tih thu sawiin Hnahthial mipuite chu Chapchar Kut, Pasaltha muala neih turah tel vek turin a sawm nghal a ni.

Kut Bazar hi vawiin March ni 10 atang March ni 12 thleng hawn tur niin Stall chi hrang hrang sawmpathum (13) - Handloom, Food Processing, AH&Vety, Florist Association leh CM Special Package te pualin hawn a ni a. Stall thenkhat hi Chapchar Kut lawmna hmu, Pasatha Mualah, Kut lawm ni hian hawn a ni bawk ang.

Hawnna programme-ah hian Hnahthial District chhunga Pisa hotu thenkhat an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: OM BY GAD ON CHAPCHAR KUT 2026
content:
540/2025-2026

10th March, 2026 :'Chapchar Kut, 2026' is to be celebrated throughout the State on 13thMarch, 2026 (Friday). As this festival promotes cultural values and traditions of the Mizos, all employees under the Government of Mizoram and various Public Sector Undertakings, Boards, Bodies and Agencies under the State Government are requested to wear Mizo Traditional Dresses to offices during the 9 th -12tli March, 2026.

All Administrative Heads and Heads of Departments are requested to bring tills to the notice of all officials and employees under their respective departments.
